title: geissois benthamii
intro: Geissois benthamii, also known as the red birch or red beech, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. The plant is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its various medicinal properties. Geissois benthamii contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although its uses and preparation methods are not widely standardized and require further research for confirmation.
